title: Change Null Values in a Table to the Previous Value
titleCn: 将表中的空值更改为前一个值

detail.title: Change Null Values in a Table to the Previous Value
detail.exampleTestcases: {"headers": {"CoffeeShop": ["id", "drink"]}, "rows": {"CoffeeShop": [[9, "Rum and Coke"], [6, null], [7, null], [3, "St Germain Spritz"], [1, "Orange Margarita"], [2, null]]}}
